---
title: "pineda_2024"
author:
- name: Will Macnair
  affiliation: 
  - Church of England
date: '`r format(as.Date("2026-02-28"), "%B %d, %Y")`'
output:
  rmdformats::downcute:
    highlight: textmate
    code_folding: hide
    toc_depth: 3
    css: custom.css
---


This page serves as a starting point for exploring the results of `scprocess`. The links below organize all generated reports, with each one detailing a specific step of the analysis (e.g., mapping, ambient RNA removal, QC).

Use this page to navigate through the full set of visualizations and outputs for your project.

## Core steps

- Mapping ([link](pineda_mapping.html))

- Ambient RNA removal ([link](pineda_ambient.html))
- QC ([link](pineda_qc.html))
- Highly variable genes ([link](pineda_hvgs.html))
- Integration ([link](pineda_integration.html))
- Marker genes ([link](pineda_marker_genes_0.2.html))

## Cell type annotation
- Celltype labelling ([link](pineda_label_celltypes.html))

## Subclustering
- myeloid_0.2 ([link](pineda_zoom_myeloid_0.2.html))
- myeloid_0.5 ([link](pineda_zoom_myeloid_0.5.html))
- neurons_0.2 ([link](pineda_zoom_neurons_0.2.html))
